prerequisites: An Eventbrite account with access to the API Keys page under Account Settings > Developer Links.
A private_token generated from your Eventbrite API Keys page (required, secret).
A start_date value marking the earliest date from which to replicate data (required).

authMethods.name: Private token (OAuth Bearer)
authMethods.summary: Eventbrite uses a personal OAuth token called a private token. It maps to the connector's private_token secret field. The token is sent on every request in the Authorization: Bearer <private_token> header against the base URL https://www.eventbriteapi.com/v3. A single private token authenticates all calls; no separate client_id or client_secret is needed for this connector.

setupSteps.title: Generate your private token in Eventbrite
setupSteps.body: Log in to your Eventbrite account, click your profile icon, and open Account Settings. Go to Developer Links > API Keys and click Create API Key. Click 'Show API key, client secret and tokens' and copy the value on the Private token line.

setupSteps.title: Provide the private token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the copied value into the private_token field. This is a required secret. The connector authenticates each request by sending it as an Authorization: Bearer token.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which the connector should begin replicating Eventbrite data.

setupSteps.title: Verify the connection
setupSteps.body: Save the configuration and run a connection check. The connector calls the Eventbrite v3 API (base URL https://www.eventbriteapi.com/v3) with your private token to confirm authentication succeeds.

sources.title: Generate an API key (Account Settings > Developer Links > API Keys > Create API Key; Show API key, client secret and tokens; Private token) - Eventbrite Help Centre
Eventbrite source - REST base URL and OAuth Bearer token (dltHub)
